raw_consumer_statement: I was charged {$5.00} on XX/XX/XXXX about 10 times for a purchase I did not make or authorize. My card is locked and has been locked every time after I have used it. So with it being locked no new purchases could go through, at least I thought that in good faith of the company when I locked my card. I did however have a subscription that is {$8.00} charged every month, which isn't what I was disputing but they were trying to make it seem like I was. After an hour on the phone, 45 minutes of it being on hold and transferred around.
